text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm heading to the stadium with a friend
to watch a baseball game when I see...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Just keep following, just keep following...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Er, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ah! It's nothing like that. I'm kind of trying to
study you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I want to run like you so I can win my next race!
That's why I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see... So you were observing me in hopes of
discovering the secret to my strength?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
While I am flattered that you would choose me as
someone to emulate, I'm running late for the
game, so I really must go—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A game?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...!
I suppose there's nothing for it. Come with me,
Rice!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: BRING 'EM HOME, YU-TA-KA!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eep! Y-yeah! Bring them home...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Rice, I can barely hear you! You need to use your
diaphragm!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-there's a lot more to baseball than I thought. I
didn't realize there would be so much shouting...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Indeed! And for the record, my attending a baseball game today was mere coincidence... I just coincidentally wanted to learn something new, and coincidentally, there was a baseball game today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It would seem the desire to cheer for athletes who are giving their all with your all is universal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I imagine the people who cheer us on in our races
feel precisely the same thing... Truly, that's the
impression I was left with.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Watching those players shook me to my very soul.
I wish to engender the same feeling in the people
who come to watch me race.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to win for the people cheering me on too.
No matter how hard it can be, or how much I want
to cry sometimes... Knowing I've got their support
makes it all worth it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: With them by my side, I can become stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. There you have it. Looks like you
succeeded in finding one of the secrets to my
strength. ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the lesson! And, um, watching the
game with you... was fun too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Really? Then I'm glad. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I'd appreciate it if you'd keep our sojourn
today between us. I shudder to think what
people, especially Gold Ship, would say if—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sure thing! You can't just go around telling anybody the secret to your strength!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I'm really grateful you let me in on yours.
Thanks to you, I'm sure victory will be mine in the
next race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling I didn't quite convey my intent
clearly... But I am happy I could help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And if... if you ever feel like watching another
game, I'd gladly accompany you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Conversely, if I feel the need to follow up my
studies with another trip to the stadium... I may
call on you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That sounds great!
